chapters.title: The Long Road
chapters.content: Ava joined a small expedition across the desert. Endless sand stretched in every direction, and the heat was stronger than she expected.

chapters.title: Night Under the Stars
chapters.content: At night, the desert became silent and cold. Sitting by the fire, Ava looked at the stars and listened to old travel stories from the guide.

chapters.title: The Hidden Oasis
chapters.content: After days of walking, they found a hidden oasis surrounded by palm trees. The fresh water felt like a miracle in the middle of the desert.
